name: The Foxes | All for the game | AFTG
description:
Palmetto Exy team.

Founded by Coach Wymack, it aims to give Foxes from disadvantaged backgrounds a second chance by functioning as a "halfway house." Unfortunately, this makes them a challenging team to train, as players often find themselves in conflict.

The Foxes have a reputation for being a mentally unstable team and are a laughingstock throughout the nation.
